title: RU Create:Nuclear
description:
This resource pack will no longer be updated as the official translation has been released! is for the mod Create: Nuclear. It is a translation into Russian. In the future, there will be translations into Ukrainian, Kazakh, and Spanish.

Enjoy the game! ;)
body:
The resource pack is no longer being updated! The official mod translation update has been released! 



This translation is for the mod Create: Nuclear. It is a translation into Russian. In the future, there will be translations into Ukrainian, Kazakh, and Spanish.

Enjoy the game! ;)
